name: Joan's Cherry Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) drained sweet pitted dark cherries
1 cup cherry juice or water, enough to make 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from the cherries, adding water if necessary to measure out 1 cup.
2. Combine the cherry juice (or water), chicken broth, nutmeg, and cloves in a saucepan with the raw rice.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cover the pan. Cook until the rice is tender and all liquid has been absorbed. Depending on the type of long-grain rice used, you may need to add more water.
5. Stir in the drained reserved cherries and dark raisins. The raisins add a touch of sweetness and help with presentation.
